Vault iOS widget

2018

mobilesketch

Design an iOS widget, an extension to metals app (a precious metal investor portfolio); widget to contain metricts of current worth of investor's vault, break down of the vault in an expanded view, machine learning suggestions on various metals.

Gallery

Widget in collapsed mode Widget in expanded mode Widget appearance when markets are closed

Role: Product designer
